title: bridge-matrix loop ignores Reconnecting/Disconnected events with no log
description: In bridge-matrix/src/bridge.rs, the relay event arm only handles ClientEvent::Message via an if-let; ClientEvent::Reconnecting and ClientEvent::Disconnected fall through silently. Unlike bridge-slack and bridge-teams (which log Reconnecting and break on Disconnected), bridge-matrix produces no trace output when the relay drops, making connectivity issues invisible in logs. Trigger: relay disconnects or reconnects while the matrix bridge is running.
